titleStmt.title: SII 6.748: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 748. (A.R. No. 266-A of 1899). ON THE EIGHTH ROUND PILLAR IN THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī vīraśrī gajapati gauḍesvara navakoṭi karnāṭa kalavaragesvara suvarnakesarī govindadeu māhārājāṅkara vije subharājye
samasta 3 Aṅka śrāhiḥ kaunadi 8 su 13 budhavāre gadādhara māhāpātraṅka govareṁ jāura kṣetrara vaḍasamsradā dūsagokṣīre ḍikāramānaṅkara
thilā kere patra . Ambhaḥ vartana desa padara vāḍa bhūi bhittareṁ rāuttā toṭākū Uttara vāpi [.] tāmara toṭhākū paścima [.] kanyāmahādiki da
kṣiṇa . E madhyare bhūi khaṇḍe paramesvaraṅka toṭākarivā nimitte pabhūīṁ pūruṇā toṭāro bhūi paḍiā hoi vanaparvata ho
ithilā [.] E nimitte E bhūiki pāñcaṭoṅkā dheniṁ E bhūi tumbhaṅku Ācandrārkasthāi kari nidhinikṣepakūpapāsāṇasahita karidhārāpū
rvakari thilṛ . Ethiki jñātisāmantapūrvādhi dānakere virothathile Āmbha tilāṭi [.] Ethakū Āna voli na pāu [.]
Ethakū sākṣi pāñcaparakaraṇa narasiṅgha pātra siṅghū pāsāpālaka Ājñā Āpasāpāleka narasiṅghapaṇḍite kulasekhara Āna [.] gāva
mudrahastaki prūmāṇa narasiṅghare (bhaṇḍāpeṭire) bhagavāna pātra Ubhae Anūmate [.] sakṣi varasamsaradaśagokṣīre ḍākāramā
naṅkara sanamata .
Digital edition of SII 6.748 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
